item.name: Tonguesnatcher
item.description:
An ancient crustacean equipped with impressively sharp pincers.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: According to tales from the golden age of Yok Huy society, this ancient crustacean is said to have cut out the tongues of perjurers. One look at the creature's bladelike pincers is enough to convince even the most skeptical scholars of the fables' veracity.
